タイトル: Seedance API認証情報未設定
影響: 本番のSeedance APIレスポンスから生成動画URLを取得するlive modeは、APIキーとエンドポイント未設定のままでは実行できない
緩和策: SEEDANCE_API_KEY、SEEDANCE_API_URL、必要に応じてSEEDANCE_RESULT_API_URL_TEMPLATEをローカル環境変数で設定し、/api/seedance/video-demoでlive modeを再検証する
メモ: 現状はプロジェクト生成MP4を安全なフォールバックとして表示。秘密情報はGitに含めない

タイトル: Seedance API 400 Bad Request due to payload shape
影響: ModelArk accepted credentials but rejected prompt/aspect_ratio/duration_seconds payload with HTTP 400
緩和策: Changed /api/seedance/video-demo to content-task payload and surfaced provider HTTP response body for debugging
メモ: Restart local FastAPI server before retesting because environment variables and code are read at startup

タイトル: Seedance task accepted but video URL not ready immediately
影響: ModelArk returned a task_id, but the demo checked for a result only once and immediately displayed the local fallback video
緩和策: Added configurable result polling after task creation so the request waits for the generated video URL before falling back
メモ: If generation still exceeds the timeout, increase SEEDANCE_POLL_TIMEOUT_SECONDS and retry after restarting FastAPI

タイトル: Seedance task can run longer than the initial request timeout
影響: Browser showed the local preview after the initial 120 second wait even though BytePlus task_status was still running
緩和策: Added browser-side task polling and /api/seedance/video-task/{task_id} so the page keeps waiting for the generated video URL without restarting the task
メモ: If tasks regularly exceed 10 minutes, increase the browser polling window or use a background job store

タイトル: Seedance API can incur cost when demo users click Generate Video
影響: With API credentials configured, accidental local calls can consume paid Seedance resource-pack tokens
緩和策: Added SEEDANCE_API_ENABLED gate with default disabled behavior, saved the generated video locally, and added download support so normal demos do not call Seedance
メモ: Only set SEEDANCE_API_ENABLED=1 during intentional generation sessions and check BytePlus ModelArk Usage after use

タイトル: External API usage visibility and daily limit gap
影響: Without a local dashboard and circuit breaker, accidental repeated Seedance/Gemini calls could be hard to notice before billing impact
緩和策: Added /admin, /api/admin/usage, a gitignored JSONL usage ledger, and daily circuit-breaker checks for Seedance generation and Gemini live calls
メモ: Provider-reported tokens are shown when responses include them; BytePlus Console remains the spend source of truth

タイトル: Browser requests for favicon.ico/admin usage alias and deprecated Gemini SDK warning
影響: Local FastAPI logs showed GET /favicon.ico and GET /admin/usage as 404, plus a google.generativeai deprecation warning during demo checks
緩和策: Generated a branded root favicon.ico, added FastAPI /favicon.ico serving, linked it from both demo HTML files, added /admin/usage as a human-friendly alias, and migrated imports to google-genai
メモ: Restart python src/app.py and hard-refresh the browser if the old missing favicon is cached

タイトル: Chrome DevTools automatic workspace request returns 404
影響: Chrome DevTools requests /.well-known/appspecific/com.chrome.devtools.json on localhost when DevTools is open
緩和策: Added a FastAPI route that returns the local project root and a stable UUID as Chrome DevTools workspace JSON
メモ: The response includes the local absolute project path by design and is intended for the 127.0.0.1 development server only

タイトル: Seedance公式ページに近いナビ/フッター/スクロール挙動が不足
影響: CEO共有済み公開URLでSeedance API連携デモとして見せる際に、元ページに近い情報設計と画面遷移感が弱い
緩和策: scripts/render_seedance_video_demo_ui.pyを更新し、root/src HTMLを再生成。Home/Models/Blog & Publication/Join Us、EN/JP、Models/Teams/Learn More系フッター、スクロール縮小ヘッダー、動画/Download/API Guard導線を追加
メモ: Playwrightでdesktop/mobile横スクロールなし、動画表示、Download href、footer表示、scrolled class付与を確認
